ApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Byakko API (e.g. https://api.byakko.dev). Used by HttpClients to build request URLs.

MaxUploadSizeInBytes.description: Maximum allowed upload size in bytes. Must match the API's Assets:MaxUploadSizeInBytes. Default is 1 GB (1073741824).

MaxValidityPeriodInDays.description: Maximum number of days a newly created asset may remain valid. Must match the API's Assets:ValidityPeriodInDays. Used to cap the expiry date picker in the Portal. Default is 30.

Oidc.description: OpenID Connect settings used by Blazor OIDC authentication.

ClientId.description: OIDC client ID registered in Keycloak for this application (e.g. portal-client).

ResponseType.description: OAuth2 response type. Use "code" for the authorisation code flow.

DefaultScopes.description: Scopes requested on every login. Typically ["openid", "profile", "email"].
